payload.reason: Victor updated Builder Console task status with grounded evidence and governance approval.

request.taskTitle: Add deterministic policy interception across memory lifecycle phases
request.query: What should happen next with the governed automation task "Add deterministic policy interception across memory lifecycle phases" in phase "Memory Governance Core Hardening"?

groundedContext.query: What should happen next with the governed automation task "Add deterministic policy interception across memory lifecycle phases" in phase "Memory Governance Core Hardening"?
semanticNodeLabels: Add deterministic policy interception across memory lifecycle phases
Teach heartbeat to select the next governed slice after phase closure
Memory lifecycle phases expose policy checkpoints with phase-specific context.
Heartbeat self-reflection can be written without attaching to a Builder phase or cluster.
Separate non-project reflection from Builder artifacts
Add artifact-level governance primitives to memory records
Automation activity and build progress remain queryable as separate surfaces.
recommendedNextActions: Implement memory lifecycle phases expose policy checkpoints with phase-specific context

before.title: Add deterministic policy interception across memory lifecycle phases
before.description: Introduce deterministic triage and per-phase policy checkpoints for encode, recall, persistence, and crystallization so memory operations are governed at every phase instead of only at write time.
acceptance: Memory lifecycle phases expose policy checkpoints with phase-specific context.
Policy interception remains deterministic and auditable instead of LLM-classified.
Rejected or audit-only decisions are surfaced before state mutation.

after.title: Add deterministic policy interception across memory lifecycle phases
